tasks.instruction:
Run a security review of the ControlWeave platform:
1. Call github_list_issues with labels='security' to check for unresolved security issues
2. Check for open Dependabot or security alerts in the GitHub repository
3. Review recent commits for: hardcoded secrets, SQL injection patterns, missing organization_id filters on queries, unparameterized queries
4. Check if critical CVEs have been published for key dependencies (express, pg, jsonwebtoken, bcryptjs)
5. For each P1 or P2 finding without an existing open GitHub issue: call github_create_issue with title '[P{severity}] {finding}', labels (severity:p1 or severity:p2, security), and details including the file/commit reference
6. Post a summary to #cw-gtm-alerts listing findings and any GitHub issues created

Focus on: SQL injection, cross-tenant data leaks, JWT vulnerabilities, dependency CVEs, hardcoded secrets.
